original text:
#EAFEFE (or 0xEAFEFE) is unknown color: approx Azure.
HEX triplet: EA, FE and FE.
RGB value is (234,254,254).
Sum of RGB (Red+Green+Blue) = 234+254+254=742 (98% of max value = 765).
Red value is 234 (91.80% from 255 or 31.54% from 742); Green value is 254 (99.61% from 255 or 34.23% from 742); Blue value is 254 (99.23% from 742); Max value from RGB is 254 - color contains mainly: green, blue.
Hex color #EAFEFE is not a web safe color.
Grayscale: #F8F8F8.
Windows color (decimal): -1376514 or 16711402.
OLE color: 16711402.
HSL color Cylindrical-coordinate representation of color #EAFEFE: hue angle of 180º degrees, saturation: 0.91, lightness: 0.96%.
HSV value (or HSB Brightness) of color is 1% and HSV saturation: 0.08%.
Process color model (Four color, CMYK) of #EAFEFE is Cyan = 0.08, Magento = 0, Yellow = 0 and Black (K on CMYK) = 0.00.
